meta.description: Weekly cyber commercial-opportunities (RFP) brief. Google-News opportunity feeds -> round-robin by region -> Claude/Ollama structured analysis -> blue-branded HTML+PDF (rfpcover/rfpbanner) -> archive+email. Week-over-week aware.

nodes.name: Search Tenders (Google CSE)
nodes.notes: Google Programmable Search (free 100/day). Returns real tender/portal links. Inert until GOOGLE_CSE_KEY + GOOGLE_CSE_CX set.

nodes.name: Send to Telegram
nodes.notes: Delivers the finished PDF to Telegram via the Bot API (sendDocument). Uses TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN + TELEGRAM_BRIEF_CHAT_ID (falls back to the first TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_CHAT_IDS entry).
